_meta.verificationNote: Control names and descriptions are indicative paraphrases of ISO/IEC 27001:2022 Annex A. Not verbatim reproductions. Organizations must refer to the official standard for authoritative text.

domains.name: Organizational Controls
domains.description: Policies, roles, responsibilities, and management processes.

domains.name: People Controls
domains.description: Screening, awareness, training, and disciplinary processes.

domains.name: Physical Controls
domains.description: Physical security of premises and equipment.

organizational.name: Policies for information security
organizational.description: Establish, approve, publish, communicate, and periodically review a set of information security policies.

organizational.name: Information security roles and responsibilities
organizational.description: Define and allocate information security roles and responsibilities.
keyActivities: Appoint security representatives per business unit

organizational.name: Segregation of duties
organizational.description: Segregate conflicting duties and areas of responsibility to reduce opportunities for unauthorized modification or misuse.
keyActivities: Implement compensating controls where segregation is impractical

organizational.name: Management responsibilities
organizational.description: Management shall require all personnel to apply information security in accordance with established policies.

organizational.name: Contact with authorities
organizational.description: Maintain appropriate contacts with relevant authorities for incident reporting and regulatory compliance.

organizational.name: Contact with special interest groups
organizational.description: Maintain appropriate contacts with special interest groups, forums, and professional associations.

organizational.name: Threat intelligence
organizational.description: Collect and analyse information about information security threats to produce threat intelligence.

organizational.name: Information security in project management
organizational.description: Integrate information security into project management methodologies regardless of project type.
keyActivities: Include security gates in project lifecycle
Assign security roles to project teams

organizational.name: Inventory of information and associated assets
organizational.description: Develop and maintain an inventory of information assets and associated assets including owners.
keyActivities: Identify and classify all information assets

organizational.name: Acceptable use of information and assets
organizational.description: Identify, document, and implement rules for the acceptable use of information and associated assets.

organizational.name: Return of assets
organizational.description: Personnel and other interested parties shall return organizational assets upon termination of employment or contract.

organizational.name: Classification of information
organizational.description: Classify information according to organizational needs for confidentiality, integrity, availability, and relevant interested party requirements.

organizational.name: Labelling of information
organizational.description: Develop and implement a set of procedures for information labelling in accordance with the classification scheme.
keyActivities: Define labelling procedures per classification level
Apply labels to physical and digital assets

organizational.name: Information transfer
organizational.description: Establish information transfer rules, procedures, and agreements for all types of transfer within and external to the organization.
keyActivities: Execute transfer agreements with third parties

organizational.name: Access control
organizational.description: Establish and implement rules to control physical and logical access to information and associated assets based on business and security requirements.

organizational.name: Identity management
organizational.description: Manage the full lifecycle of identities including creation, verification, maintenance, and deactivation.

organizational.name: Authentication information
organizational.description: Control allocation and management of authentication information through a formal management process.

organizational.name: Access rights
organizational.description: Provision, review, modify, and remove access rights in accordance with access control policy.
keyActivities: Remove access on role change or termination

organizational.name: Information security in supplier relationships
organizational.description: Define and implement processes to manage information security risks associated with the use of supplier products and services.

organizational.name: Addressing information security within supplier agreements
organizational.description: Establish and agree relevant information security requirements with each supplier based on the type of supplier relationship.

organizational.name: Managing information security in the ICT supply chain
organizational.description: Define and implement processes to manage information security risks associated with the ICT products and services supply chain.

organizational.name: Monitoring, review and change management of supplier services
organizational.description: Monitor, review, evaluate, and manage changes to supplier information security practices and service delivery.

organizational.name: Information security for use of cloud services
organizational.description: Establish processes for acquisition, use, management, and exit from cloud services in accordance with security requirements.

organizational.name: Information security incident management planning and preparation
organizational.description: Plan and prepare for information security incident management by defining and establishing incident management roles, responsibilities, and procedures.

organizational.name: Assessment and decision on information security events
organizational.description: Assess information security events and decide whether they should be categorized as information security incidents.

organizational.name: Response to information security incidents
organizational.description: Respond to information security incidents in accordance with documented procedures.

organizational.name: Learning from information security incidents
organizational.description: Use knowledge gained from information security incidents to strengthen and improve information security controls.

organizational.name: Collection of evidence
organizational.description: Establish and implement procedures for identification, collection, acquisition, and preservation of evidence related to information security events.
keyActivities: Train staff on digital forensics basics

organizational.name: Information security during disruption
organizational.description: Plan how to maintain information security at an appropriate level during disruption.
keyActivities: Define minimum security posture during crisis
Test security controls under DR scenarios

organizational.name: ICT readiness for business continuity
organizational.description: Plan, implement, maintain, and test ICT readiness based on business continuity objectives and ICT continuity requirements.

organizational.name: Legal, statutory, regulatory and contractual requirements
organizational.description: Identify, document, and keep up to date the relevant legal, statutory, regulatory, and contractual requirements for information security.

organizational.name: Intellectual property rights
organizational.description: Implement appropriate procedures to ensure compliance with legal, statutory, regulatory, and contractual requirements related to intellectual property rights.

organizational.name: Protection of records
organizational.description: Protect records from loss, destruction, falsification, unauthorized access, and unauthorized release in accordance with legal and regulatory requirements.

organizational.name: Privacy and protection of PII
organizational.description: Identify and meet requirements regarding preservation of privacy and protection of PII as required by applicable laws and regulations.

organizational.name: Independent review of information security
organizational.description: Review the organization's approach to managing information security and its implementation at planned intervals or when significant changes occur.

organizational.name: Compliance with policies, rules and standards
organizational.description: Ensure compliance with the information security policy, topic-specific policies, rules, and standards.

organizational.name: Documented operating procedures
organizational.description: Document and make available operating procedures for information processing facilities.

people.name: Screening
people.description: Background verification checks on all candidates for employment shall be carried out prior to joining and on an ongoing basis.
keyActivities: Implement periodic re-screening for sensitive roles

people.name: Terms and conditions of employment
people.description: Employment contractual agreements shall state the personnel's and the organization's responsibilities for information security.
keyActivities: Include security obligations in employment contracts

people.name: Information security awareness, education and training
people.description: Personnel and relevant interested parties shall receive appropriate information security awareness, education, and training.

people.name: Disciplinary process
people.description: A disciplinary process shall be formalized and communicated to take action against personnel who have committed an information security policy violation.

people.name: Responsibilities after termination or change of employment
people.description: Information security responsibilities that remain valid after termination or change of employment shall be defined, enforced, and communicated.

people.name: Confidentiality or non-disclosure agreements
people.description: Identify and regularly review confidentiality or non-disclosure requirements reflecting the organization's needs for protection of information.
keyActivities: Implement NDA for employees and contractors
Ensure NDA coverage for sensitive projects

people.name: Remote working
people.description: Implement security measures when personnel are working remotely to protect information accessed, processed, or stored outside the organization's premises.

people.name: Information security event reporting
people.description: Provide a mechanism for personnel to report observed or suspected information security events through appropriate channels in a timely manner.
keyActivities: Train staff on what to report

physical.name: Physical security perimeters
physical.description: Define and use security perimeters to protect areas that contain information and associated assets.

physical.name: Physical entry
physical.description: Secure areas shall be protected by appropriate entry controls to ensure only authorized personnel are allowed access.

physical.name: Securing offices, rooms and facilities
physical.description: Design and apply physical security for offices, rooms, and facilities.

physical.name: Physical security monitoring
physical.description: Monitor premises continuously for unauthorized physical access.

physical.name: Protecting against physical and environmental threats
physical.description: Design and implement protection against physical and environmental threats such as natural disasters, malicious attacks, and accidents.

physical.name: Working in secure areas
physical.description: Design and implement security measures for working in secure areas.
keyActivities: Restrict knowledge of secure area locations

physical.name: Clear desk and clear screen
physical.description: Define and enforce clear desk rules for papers and removable storage media and clear screen rules for information processing facilities.
keyActivities: Provide secure storage for sensitive documents

physical.name: Equipment siting and protection
physical.description: Site and protect equipment to reduce risks from physical and environmental threats and unauthorized access.
keyActivities: Position equipment to minimize environmental risk

physical.name: Security of assets off-premises
physical.description: Protect off-site assets taking into account the different risks of working outside the organization's premises.
keyActivities: Apply security controls to off-site assets

physical.name: Storage media
physical.description: Manage storage media through their lifecycle of acquisition, use, transportation, and disposal in accordance with classification.

physical.name: Supporting utilities
physical.description: Protect information processing facilities from power failures and other disruptions caused by failures in supporting utilities.

physical.name: Cabling security
physical.description: Protect cables carrying power and data from interception, interference, and damage.

physical.name: Equipment maintenance
physical.description: Maintain equipment correctly to ensure availability, integrity, and continued support of information security.

physical.name: Secure disposal or re-use of equipment
physical.description: Verify that items of equipment containing storage media are securely overwritten or physically destroyed prior to disposal or re-use.

technological.name: User endpoint devices
technological.description: Protect information stored on, processed by, or accessible via user endpoint devices.

technological.name: Privileged access rights
technological.description: Restrict and manage the allocation and use of privileged access rights.

technological.name: Information access restriction
technological.description: Restrict access to information and application system functions in accordance with access control policy.

technological.name: Access to source code
technological.description: Manage access to source code, development tools, and software libraries appropriately.

technological.name: Secure authentication
technological.description: Implement secure authentication technologies and procedures based on information access restrictions and access control policy.

technological.name: Capacity management
technological.description: Monitor and adjust the use of resources in line with current and expected capacity requirements.

technological.name: Protection against malware
technological.description: Implement and maintain appropriate protection against malware.

technological.name: Management of technical vulnerabilities
technological.description: Obtain information about technical vulnerabilities in a timely fashion, evaluate exposure, and take appropriate measures.

technological.name: Configuration management
technological.description: Establish, implement, monitor, and review configurations including security configurations of hardware, software, services, and networks.

technological.name: Information deletion
technological.description: Delete information stored in information systems, devices, or other storage media when no longer required.

technological.name: Data masking
technological.description: Use data masking in accordance with access control policy and business requirements, taking into account applicable legislation.

technological.name: Data leakage prevention
technological.description: Apply data leakage prevention measures to systems, networks, and other devices that process, store, or transmit sensitive information.

technological.name: Information backup
technological.description: Maintain and regularly test backup copies of information, software, and systems in accordance with the agreed backup policy.

technological.name: Redundancy of information processing facilities
technological.description: Implement information processing facilities with sufficient redundancy to meet availability requirements.

technological.name: Logging
technological.description: Produce, store, protect, and analyse logs that record activities, exceptions, faults, and other relevant events.

technological.name: Monitoring activities
technological.description: Monitor networks, systems, and applications for anomalous behaviour and take appropriate actions to evaluate potential information security incidents.

technological.name: Clock synchronization
technological.description: Synchronize clocks of information processing systems to an approved time source.

technological.name: Use of privileged utility programs
technological.description: Restrict and tightly control the use of utility programs that might be capable of overriding system and application controls.

technological.name: Installation of software on operational systems
technological.description: Implement procedures and controls to manage the installation of software on operational systems.

technological.name: Networks security
technological.description: Secure, manage, and control networks to protect information in systems and applications.

technological.name: Security of network services
technological.description: Identify, implement, and monitor security mechanisms, service levels, and service requirements for network services.

technological.name: Segregation of networks
technological.description: Segregate groups of information services, users, and information systems within networks.

technological.name: Web filtering
technological.description: Manage access to external websites to reduce exposure to malicious content.

technological.name: Use of cryptography
technological.description: Define and implement rules for the effective use of cryptography including key management.

technological.name: Secure development life cycle
technological.description: Establish and apply rules for the secure development of software and systems.

technological.name: Application security requirements
technological.description: Identify, specify, and approve information security requirements when developing or acquiring applications.

technological.name: Secure system architecture and engineering principles
technological.description: Establish, document, maintain, and apply principles for engineering secure systems.

technological.name: Secure coding
technological.description: Apply secure coding principles to software development.

technological.name: Security testing in development and acceptance
technological.description: Define and implement security testing processes in the development life cycle.

technological.name: Outsourced development
technological.description: Direct, monitor, and review activities related to outsourced system development.

technological.name: Separation of development, test and production environments
technological.description: Separate development, testing, and production environments to reduce risks of unauthorized access or changes to the production environment.
keyActivities: Sanitize production data for test use

technological.name: Change management
technological.description: Manage changes to information processing facilities and systems subject to change management procedures.

technological.name: Test information
technological.description: Appropriately select, protect, and manage test information.

technological.name: Protection of information systems during audit testing
technological.description: Plan and agree audit tests and other assurance activities involving assessment of operational systems to minimize disruptions to business processes.
